scene.message: Reiji: Heh heh...{waitkey}{ret}Nanjo: What's with you?{nl} Creepy guy.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Inaba, I hear you're{nl} scared of heights.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Wh-where'd you{nl} hear that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Sorry I'm late~!{nl} What's up, everyone?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Whaat?! Why?!{nl} I was looking forward to it!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Nanjo, you bastard...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Heh heh heh...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Is it true, Inaba?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: No... um...{nl} I'll go... I'll go.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hmhm...{wait_fr:88} Pandora{wait_fr:60}, huh...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Hey, what's{nl} that supposed to mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Voice: Hurry up!{nl} {ctl07:1}!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Oh? Here you are,{nl} Mr. Wet-pants.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Gah!{wait_fr:88} Y-you bastard,{nl} where'd you hear that?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Oh, really!{nl} Then let's hurry on!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Uesugi, you bastard...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Pff pff pff...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Uesugi! You'll pay{nl} for this!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Hmhm...{wait_fr:88} Pandora{wait_fr:60}, huh...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: What's that mean?{nl} Hey, wait for me!{waitkey}{ret}
